746.reason: Potential StringIndexOutOfBoundsException if line ends with '/'

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Potential StringIndexOutOfBoundsException if line ends with '/'

977.reason: The loop lacks a termination condition (e.g., checking for EOF or breaking when no tokens are consumed). If the parser reaches the end of the file or encounters an unexpected token that doesn't match any of the inner while conditions, it will loop infinitely, causing Time Limit Exceeded.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  The loop lacks a termination condition (e.g., checking for EOF or breaking when no tokens are consumed). If the parser reaches the end of the file or encounters an unexpected token that doesn't match any of the inner while conditions, it will loop infinitely, causing Time Limit Exceeded.

947.reason: The loop condition is always true, and there is no break statement or exit condition when the token does not match any declaration or function definition start symbols (e.g., at EOF or after an unrecoverable error), causing an infinite loop and Time Limit Exceeded.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  The loop condition is always true, and there is no break statement or exit condition when the token does not match any declaration or function definition start symbols (e.g., at EOF or after an unrecoverable error), causing an infinite loop and Time Limit Exceeded.

1520.reason: [After reporting a missing ')' error, the parser still calls next(), which advances to the next token even when the current token is not ')'. This causes the parser to skip the current token and potentially miss subsequent syntax errors or get out of sync with the actual token stream.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [After reporting a missing ')' error, the parser still calls next(), which advances to the next token even when the current token is not ')'. This causes the parser to skip the current token and potentially miss subsequent syntax errors or get out of sync with the actual token stream.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The 'next()' call advances the lexer position even when RPARENT is missing, which may skip over the actual token that should be processed next and interfere with subsequent error detection or parsing]
